{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Crystal Nexus
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Crystal Nexus]] strengthens [[madra]] at the cost of extra strain on channels.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
